filesystem.description: Scoped filesystem read/write for project root — required by all agents (P0)

postgres.description: PostGIS/PostgreSQL query execution — requires local PostGIS container (P0)

doc-state.description: Distributed doc locking for multi-agent INDEX.md sync — P0 critical

formats.description: GIS format validation: Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON, .prj CRS parsing

cesium.description: CesiumJS 3D tile validation, camera bounds, bounding volume checks

openaware.description: Real-time flight tracking bbox filter via OpenSky Network

stitch.description: NeRF/3DGS pipeline orchestration — requires nerfstudio installed

computerUse.description: Desktop automation for visual testing — prefer chrome-devtools for most tasks

opensky.description: OpenSky Network ADS-B flight queries with rate limiting — Cape Town airspace

gis-mcp.description: Core GIS operations: geometry validation, CRS detection, bbox checks, spatial stats

gemini-deep-research.description: Gemini Deep Research: multi-step web-grounded research and report generation

context7.description: Fetch current library docs: MapLibre, Supabase, Next.js 15, Serwist, Turf.js

exa.description: Exa semantic web search for GIS research, academic papers, open data portals

playwright.description: Playwright browser automation for E2E testing and UI validation

chrome-devtools.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol: Lighthouse, network, DOM, performance, accessibility

docker.description: Docker container management for local dev stack (PostGIS, Martin, LocalStack)

localstack.description: Local AWS service emulation — S3 bucket simulation for Supabase Storage fallbacks

vercel.description: Vercel deployment management: list deployments, build status, env vars

sequentialthinking.description: Chain-of-thought reasoning for complex architectural and spatial decisions

cesium-ion.description: Cesium Ion cloud: upload assets, stream 3D Tiles — requires COPILOT_MCP_CESIUM_ION_TOKEN

nerfstudio.description: Nerfstudio Python interface: training, COLMAP SfM, GPU monitoring — requires GPU

nano-banana.description: Google Gemini AI via MCP — deep reasoning, multi-modal analysis

stitch-google.description: Google Stitch HTTP MCP — distinct from local mcp/stitch/server.js

open-aware.description: Qodo Open-Aware SSE MCP — code quality awareness
